seoTitle: Narrangullen vs Narrawa — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Narrangullen and Narrawa. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Narrangullen and Narrawa.
heading: Narrangullen vs Narrawa — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Narrangullen, New South Wales and Narrawa, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Narrawa has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Narrangullen (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Narrangullen or Narrawa safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Narrangullen has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Narrawa scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Narrangullen scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Narrawa scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Narrangullen or Narrawa?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Narrawa has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
